channel.title: Caesar AI Regulation Watch — Sample changes (pilot)
channel.description: Manual sample regulatory change records for governance review. Not legal advice. Not automated monitoring. Human review required.

item.title: Feed notice: sample data only
item.description: Pilot data for governance review support only. Not legal advice. Not a compliance guarantee. Not complete global coverage. Sample records require human review before client use. Official sources control.

item.title: Sample change: sample-eu-ai-act-status-change (eu)
item.description: Manual sample change: EUR-Lex metadata or status presentation for Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 may have been updated (e.g. consolidation label, related-document links, or timeline display). This is a fictionalised example for schema testing—not an automated detection. Supports governance review to confirm whether internal AI system registers or compliance calendars need a refresh. Possible impact (for review only): May affect controls related to regulatory tracking and evidence items such as AI system registers or governance memos if confirmed on the official source. Not legal advice. Human review required.

item.title: Sample change: sample-datatilsynet-guidance-change (norway)
item.description: Manual sample change: Datatilsynet may have published or updated a page or article on AI and automated decision-making (illustrative example for schema testing). Not an automated detection. Supports governance review of privacy documentation, DPIAs, and transparency materials for AI systems processing personal data in Norway. Possible impact (for review only): May affect evidence such as DPIA records, privacy notices, and AI governance memos if a substantive guidance update is confirmed on the official site. Not legal advice. Human review required.
